comment: Preserves identical distorted-image inputs while testing reference-channel alignment sensitivity for every method.
Common calibration-noise analogue that does not privilege the phase-only stack.
Applies only to methods whose forward model explicitly depends on propagation geometry.
Report separately from headline method ranking because no equivalent optical mask exists for the digital-only baselines.
Engineering robustness test for fabricated-mask alignment, not a cross-method fairness metric.
